identity.name: E1: The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a 'Studio Light' aesthetic that feels like a high-end creative tool, not a generic SaaS. Minimal, precise, and art-forward.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix 'Swiss Print Design' with 'Laboratory Interface'.
Content is King: The generated video is the hero. UI recedes.
Negative Space: Use 3x more padding than comfortable.
No Gradient Overload: Use solid, high-contrast monochrome with one 'Holographic' accent.

headings.usage: All section titles, modal headers, and the main 'Generate' text.

rules: Use 'surface' for cards and 'background' for the main app canvas.
Text should never be pure black (#000000). Use #18181B.
Borders should be subtle (#E4E4E7) or removed entirely in favor of shadow.

grid_system.history_gallery: Bento Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Mix col-span-2 for 'Hero' generations.
grid_system.style_selector: Flex scroll or Grid: grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6

containers.prompt_box: Floating 'Command Center' style. Max width 800px. Centered initially, moves to bottom after generation.
containers.preview_player: Cinematic aspect ratio (16:9). No visible controls until hover.

shadcn_overrides.button: Sharp corners or full pill. No default 'rounded-md'. Hover: Scale 1.02 + Shadow-lg.
shadcn_overrides.input: Height: h-12 or h-14. Border-0. Shadow-sm. Focus: Ring-2 Ring-black/5.
shadcn_overrides.slider: Track: h-2 bg-secondary. Thumb: h-6 w-6 border-2 border-primary bg-background.

prompt_input.style: Glassmorphism: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 shadow-2xl.
prompt_input.animation: Animate layout change from Center to Bottom upon first generation.

style_card.style: Aspect-square or 4:3. Image full bleed. Text overlay on hover only.

style_presets.name: Cinematic
style_presets.description: High contrast, dramatic lighting, movie scene.

style_presets.name: Cyberpunk
style_presets.description: Neon lights, futuristic city, tech noir.

visual_enhancers.motion: Use Framer Motion for: 1. Prompt box movement. 2. Staggered entrance of history items. 3. Loading state pulse.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE TAILWIND CONFIG: Add 'Outfit' and 'DM Sans' fonts. Update colors to the palette provided.
2. CLEANUP: Remove generic App.css styles. Reset body margins.
3. COMPONENT CUSTOMIZATION: When using Shadcn, strip the 'default' radius and apply specific rounded classes (e.g., 'rounded-2xl' for cards, 'rounded-full' for buttons).
4. MOCK API: Create a simulated delay (3s) for video generation. Show a progress bar that isn't linear (fast then slow).
5. DATA-TESTID: Ensure every interactive element (Button, Input, Card) has a data-testid attribute.
6. PROMPT HISTORY: Store in localStorage for MVP. Display in a Sidebar or Grid.
7. VIDEO PLAYER: Use a standard HTML5 video tag with custom styled controls (play/pause overlay).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Create depth through layered design elements.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Never use AI assistant Emoji characters.
